fix-monitor-index-2026-07-06.description: Fix IndexOutOfRangeException when monitors are unplugged (currentMonitorIndex out-of-bounds). Build passes.

perf-mouse-coalesce-2026-07-06.description: Coalesce mouse hook dispatches using Interlocked.CompareExchange. At most 1 work item queued at a time. Build passes.

fix-hotkey-notification-2026-07-06.description: Show tray balloon tip when RegisterHotKey fails due to conflict with another app. Build passes. Closes #65.

fix-persist-settings-2026-07-05.description: Minimal fix: persist Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn in AppSettings.

test-appsettings-comprehensive-2026-07-0.description: xUnit test project for AppSettings: 19 tests all green.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI

notes: 2026-07-06 run (14:03 UTC): Tasks 3+8. Task 3: found new bug - IndexOutOfRangeException when monitors unplugged (currentMonitorIndex not clamped after HasMultipleMonitors refreshes Screen.AllScreens). Fix submitted as branch repo-assist/fix-monitor-index-2026-07-06. Task 8: implemented mouse hook dispatch coalescing using Interlocked.CompareExchange - at most 1 pending work item on Dispatcher at any time (vs flooding at 200+ Hz). Branch repo-assist/perf-mouse-coalesce-2026-07-06. Monthly summary #103 updated.
